name: VIVA Finance, Inc.
description_short: VIVA Finance offers affordable fixed-rate personal loans up to $10,000 based on employment history, not just credit score. Rated 4.9/5 with 3,657 Google reviews.
description_long:
VIVA Finance, Inc. is a credit repair provider serving clients in Atlanta, Georgia. With 3,657 Google reviews and a 4.9/5.0 rating, VIVA Finance, Inc. has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

VIVA Finance, Inc. specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Atlanta, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. VIVA Finance, Inc. operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Atlanta, Georgia area who are considering VIVA Finance, Inc. should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

Employees with 1+ year at their current job seeking personal loans
People who need up to $10,000 with fixed monthly payments
Borrowers who want approval based on employment, not just credit score
diagnosis: A highly-rated personal loan provider specializing in employment-based approvals for borrowers with bad or limited credit. Fixed-rate loans up to $10,000 with strong customer satisfaction (4.9/5, 3,657 reviews).
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 112 Krog St NE Suite D145, Atlanta, GA 30307
